CustomField.description: Day of month (1-31) when work log entries are locked for the prior billing period. For example, if set to 1, hours for March must be entered by 5pm EST on March 31. After that, March work logs cannot be created or edited. Works with InvoiceHourLockoutTimeNumber__c for the hour cutoff. Null disables lockout.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Day of month when hours are locked for the prior period (e.g., 1 = lock on the 1st). Null disables lockout.
CustomField.label: Invoice Hour Lockout Day
